Overrides.Override: 10% reduced Attributes 40% increased Global Defences Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Fortress
Enemies Poisoned by you have 10% of Physical Damage they deal converted to Chaos Limited to 1 Runegraft of Rotblood
15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery
Elusive's Effect on you is increased instead for the first 2 seconds Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Agile

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Bino's Kitchen Knife Slaughter Knife Unique ID: 0db5e60442113deed1ea654b8df1a7adcf21ec3ce7934a6d43bc2665ac1fdbad Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-B LevelReq: 58 Implicits: 1 30% increased Global Critical Strike Chance Adds 141 to 229 Physical Damage 47% increased Critical Strike Chance +22% to Global Critical Strike Multiplier +19% to Chaos Resistance On Killing a Poisoned Enemy, Enemies within 3 metres are Poisoned, and you and Allies Regenerate 400 Life per second for the Poison's duration if within 3 metres
